raw:
## Completed
Implemented the soft Foreman doc-er stage and hard advisory doc drift detector. Doc-er now runs after clean pre-ship approval and before Gate 2, reports doc status to the founder, and adds updated doc paths to release staging without blocking ship.

## Files Changed
- `.pi/foreman.json` - adds `docer_test.sh` to the per-round verify gate.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/doc-er.md` - new doc-er crew agent prompt/model/tools/boundaries.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wires doc-er stage, Gate 2 surfacing, ledger events, drift checks, and release staging.
- `extensions/foreman/agent-timeouts.ts` - adds `doc-er` timeout role/defaults/env overrides/degradation.
- `extensions/foreman/docdrift.ts` - new pure drift detector helper.
- `extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh` - new doc-er/drift/orchestration grep tests.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh` - adds doc-er timeout coverage.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documents the new stage and invariants.

## How To Verify
`grep -q 'claude-opus-4-8:xhigh' extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Also ran all Foreman test scripts plus dashboard reader tests successfully. For live pi use, run `./install.sh` (or otherwise symlink `doc-er.md`) so the new crew agent is present under `~/.pi/agent/agents/`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
